description_long: This is a tactical pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a short barrel and a prominent tubular magazine beneath it. The receiver is equipped with a side saddle shell holder, capable of holding several extra shells for quick reloading. The shotgun has a pistol grip instead of a traditional full stock, enhancing maneuverability in close-quarters urban environments. The fore-end is ribbed for improved grip, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing protection for the trigger mechanism. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The visible materials suggest a combination of metal for the barrel and receiver, and polymer for the grip and fore-end.
description: A compact, matte black pump-action shotgun with a pistol grip, ribbed fore-end, and side saddle shell holder, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, tubular magazine, and the compact, narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pistol grip, ribbed fore-end, side saddle shell holder, and the full length of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the pistol grip, the trigger guard, and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the shell holder and the overall tactical design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a robust, protective shape and no visible finger grooves
